properties.name: Galveston Island — Low Core
properties.description: The lowest-lying sections of Galveston Island including historic downtown areas, east end, and near sea-wall gaps.

properties.name: Bolivar Peninsula — Core
properties.description: Low-lying barrier peninsula including Crystal Beach and High Island approaches.

properties.name: West Galveston Bay Marshes
properties.description: Coastal marshes and tidal flats on the western shore of Galveston Bay.

properties.name: Texas City / La Marque Lowlands
properties.description: Industrial coastal areas of Texas City and La Marque, including the Texas City Dike vicinity.

properties.name: Clear Lake / NASA / League City Shores
properties.description: Low-lying suburban areas along Clear Lake and upper Galveston Bay, including parts of Seabrook, Kemah, Clear Lake Shores, and Webster.

properties.name: Baytown / Channelview Lowlands
properties.description: The Baytown and Channelview areas sit atop 3+ meters of cumulative historical subsidence, leaving them effectively much lower than original elevation.

properties.name: South Houston / Pasadena Bayou Corridors
properties.description: Low-lying areas along Brays Bayou, Buffalo Bayou tributaries, and Clear Creek through south Houston and Pasadena.

properties.name: League City / Friendswood Inland Areas
properties.description: Slightly higher suburban areas of League City and Friendswood, at risk under high SLR scenarios combined with local subsidence.
